examples: This led to the construction of earthen or stone steps, arranging the audience into a semicircle in front of the speaker.
Cut the circular cake in half and set each semicircle against adjoining sides of the square to form the top of the heart.
We sat in a semicircle round the fire.
Back then, the horses used to charge out to sea, with the field turning back on themselves in a semicircle.
She was drawn to a room where a crowd had gathered in a semicircle before a canvas, obviously mesmerized.
